base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should increase call_wall_acceptance_long from a one-trade clean sample toward a measurable VALID_0DTE profile while avoiding the hard-saturated take-profit family. Tradeoff is possible added exposure from looser flow gates; reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_001, profile MAE degrades materially, or added trades displace stronger pullback/squeeze entries.
label: promote
rationale: Use batch_a_call_wall_acceptance_long as an entry/option-confirmation sample-builder, not a take-profit experiment. The latest run shows call_wall_acceptance_long is underexplored but exceptionally clean: 1 VALID_0DTE trade, $91 PnL, 455 PnL/exposure hour, and -11.7 MAE. Prior 1DTE and fallback tightening hurt score, and the novelty guardrail rejected TP-family changes, so this isolates call-wall entry confirmation thresholds only.
